title: Support max_tokens for Tactus retarget variants
description:
Feature: TactusScore model retarget token limits

Scenario: TactusScore retarget applies max_tokens
Given a TactusScore YAML with ClassifyProcedure
When scorecard_model_retarget receives max_tokens
Then the planned candidate YAML includes max_tokens inside ClassifyProcedure
And the procedure does not reject the target.

Scenario: Frontier variants apply Tactus max_tokens
Given a TactusScore candidate matrix parameter_set includes max_tokens
When frontier variants are generated
Then the candidate YAML includes max_tokens inside ClassifyProcedure.

comments.author: derek.norrbom
comments.text: Implemented Plexus support for TactusScore max_tokens variants: shared frontier generation inserts max_tokens into ClassifyProcedure, scorecard_model_retarget no longer rejects max_tokens for TactusScore, and procedure descriptions/tests now reflect the supported behavior. Validated 21 focused Plexus tests.
